sources.notes: GPT-5.5 standard processing API price: input $5.00, cached input $0.50, output $30.00 per 1M tokens.

notes: This card estimates API-equivalent dollar costs for harnesses that expose token usage but not dollar cost.
Claude Code reports total_cost_usd directly; scripts/apply-rate-card.mjs preserves reported costs and does not overwrite them.
Cursor estimates are API-equivalent estimates for the emitted GPT-5.5 model name. They are not Cursor subscription billing or credit accounting.
OpenAI output_tokens are treated as already including reasoning output tokens, so reasoning_output is set to 0 to avoid double counting.
